summary: Windows Terminal 3-mode installer, golangci-lint + go vet, combo keywords in summary, GitMap URL update
changes: Script 37: Windows Terminal installer via winget with 3-mode support (install+settings, settings-only, install-only)
Windows Terminal settings sync from settings/03 - windows-terminal/ to LocalState directory
Keywords: wt, windows-terminal, wt+settings, wt-settings, install-wt with mode mappings
Added golangci-lint install support to script 06 (Go) -- installs via go install with version pinning
Added go vet integration to script 06 -- runs go vet ./... after Go install for verification
Added combo keywords section to spec/script-registry-summary.md showing multi-script keywords
Updated GitMap install URL from alimtvnetwork/git-repo-navigator to alimtvnetwork/gitmap-v2 in config.json and spec
